label: Ideo color
description: Defines an ideology color option by referencing a ColorDef and optional meme or culture filters. Inherits meme and culture filters from IdeoSymbolPartDef.

colorDef.label: Color def
colorDef.description: ColorDef used when this ideology color option is selected. At runtime this should reference a ColorDef whose colorType is Ideo.

basic-ideo-color.label: Basic ideo color
basic-ideo-color.description: Minimal ideology color option with a def name and referenced ColorDef.
